mule.xsi:schemaLocation: http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/core/current/mule.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/ee/core/current/mule-ee.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/salesforce/current/mule-salesforce.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/http/current/mule-http.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/hl7 http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/hl7/current/mule-hl7.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/email/current/mule-email.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/sap http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/sap/current/mule-sap.xsd http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os http://www.mulesoft.org/schema/mule/os/current/mule-os.xsd

logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : correlationId, eventTimestamp : now(), applicationName: Mule::p('application.name'), flowName: flow.name default "implementation-flow", environment: upper(p('mule.env')), source: Mule::p('source'), target: Mule::p('target'), message: "request received from salesforce", inputPayload: payload }]

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Contact_Id__c, FirstName, LastName, MiddleName, Marital_Status__c, Language_Preferred__c, Patient_Gender_2__c, HF_Chart_Number__c, Email, Phone, MailingCountry, MailingState, MailingPostalCode, MailingCity, MailingStreet, Patient_Ethnicity__c, Patient_Race__c, Patient_Gender__c, Date_of_Birth__c,HealthFusion_Patient_Record_ID__c FROM Contact WHERE Id = ':Id'

logger.doc:name: Log Contact Record

salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT Id, Email, Username FROM User WHERE Id = ':Id'

ee:variables.ee:set-variable:
%dw 2.0 output text/plain var body = { "Hello": vars.userEmailVar[0].Username, "Message": "This email is to notify you that the following critical fields have been updated for a Contact in Salesforce", "Contact Details": { "ModifiedTime": now() as DateTime, "ContactId": payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.recordIds[0], "Updated details": [ if (payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changedFields contains "Name.FirstName") "The following contact First Name is updated to: " ++ payload.data.payload.Name.FirstName else null, if (payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changedFields contains "Name.LastName") "The following contact Last Name is updated to: " ++ payload.data.payload.Name.LastName else null, if (payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changedFields contains "Date_of_Birth__c") "The following contact Date of Birth is updated to: " ++ payload.data.payload.Date_of_Birth__c as String else null ] filter ((msg) -> msg != null) }, "UserID": payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.commitUser, "Note": "If this update was intentional, no further action is required. Otherwise, please review the change and ensure its accuracy." }
--- "Hello: " ++ body.Hello ++ " Message: " ++ body.Message ++ "
Contact Details: - Modified Time: " ++ (body.'Contact Details'.ModifiedTime as String default "N/A") ++ " - ContactId: " ++ (body.'Contact Details'.ContactId as String default "N/A") ++ " - Updated Details: " ++ (body.'Contact Details'.'Updated details' joinBy "\n ") ++ "
UserID: " ++ (body.UserID as String default "N/A") ++ " Note: " ++ body.Note
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- "Contact Information Update Alert: " ++ (vars.queryData[0].FirstName default "") ++ " " ++ (vars.queryData[0].LastName default "")
%dw 2.0 output application/json --- if ((vars.userEmailVar[0].Email) != null and (vars.userEmailVar[0].Email?)) vars.userEmailVar[0].Email else ("mrudhula.eerisetti@prowesssoft.com")

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- "Contact " ++ (payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changeType default "") ++ " Error: " ++ (vars.queryData[0].FirstName default "") ++ " " ++ (vars.queryData[0].LastName default "")

logger.doc:name: Log Mapped Variables
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { transactionId: vars.transactionId, subject: vars.subject, emailAddressVar: vars.emailAddressVar, errorBody: vars.errorBody, errorSubject: vars.errorSubject } ]
email notification sent successfully

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "status": "ERROR", "message": "Error processing ADT message: " + (error.description default "Unknown error"), "errorType": error.errorType.identifier default "UNKNOWN", "timestamp": now() }

logger.doc:name: ADT Processing Error Logger
logger.message: ADT MESSAGE ERROR - Type: #[error.errorType.identifier default 'UNKNOWN'], Description: #[error.description default 'Unknown error']

logger.doc:name: 1. Valid Patient
logger.message: PROCESSING PATIENT - UserId: #[payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.commitUser], Name: #[vars.queryData[0].FirstName default ''] #[vars.queryData[0].LastName default '']

logger.doc:name: ADT Configuration Logger
logger.message: ADT message configuration: No Object Store mappings required for ADT^A04/A08 messages per NextGen specification.

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (!isEmpty(payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.entityName) and (!isEmpty(payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changeType))) (payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.entityName ~= "Contact" and payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changeType ~= "CREATE") else false

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- if (!isEmpty(payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.entityName) and (!isEmpty(payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changeType))) (payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.entityName ~= "Contact" and payload.data.payload.ChangeEventHeader.changeType ~= "UPDATE") else false

logger.doc:name: 2. Variables Setup
logger.message: CONTACT VARIABLES - Language: #[vars.languageField default 'null'], Event Type: #[vars.eventType], Create?: #[vars.checkConditionCreate], Update?: #[vars.checkConditionUpdate]

logger.doc:name: 3. Address Fields Analysis
logger.message: ADDRESS FIELD ANALYSIS - MailingStreet: #[vars.queryData[0].MailingStreet default 'null'], Contains newline in JSON: #[write(vars.queryData[0].MailingStreet,'application/json') contains '\\n'], Contains newline raw: #[vars.queryData[0].MailingStreet contains '\n'], Raw: #[write(vars.queryData[0].MailingStreet,'application/json')]
id is valid processing HL7 message

logger.doc:name: 4. Pre-A04 Mapping
logger.message: CREATING A04 MESSAGE - Contact ID: #[vars.queryData[0].Id default 'null'], HF ID: #[vars.queryData[0].HealthFusion_Patient_Record_ID__c default 'null']

logger.doc:name: 5. A04 Transformed Payload
logger.message: A04 TRANSFORMED - Payload preview: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- substring(payload, 0, 200) ++ '...']

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { hasMSH: payload contains 'MSH|', hasPID: payload contains 'PID|', hasSCH: payload contains 'SCH|', hasAIL: payload contains 'AIL|', hasAIP: payload contains 'AIP|' }]

logger.doc:name: 6. Post-HL7 Write A04
logger.message: A04 HL7 MESSAGE - Type: ADT^A04, Size: #[sizeOf(payload)]

logger.doc:name: 7. Pre-A08 Mapping
logger.message: CREATING A08 MESSAGE - Contact ID: #[vars.queryData[0].Id default 'null'], HF ID: #[vars.queryData[0].HealthFusion_Patient_Record_ID__c default 'null']

logger.doc:name: 8. A08 Transformed Payload
logger.message: A08 TRANSFORMED - Payload preview: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- substring(payload, 0, 200) ++ '...']

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { hasMSH: payload contains 'MSH|', hasPID: payload contains 'PID|', hasSCH: payload contains 'SCH|', hasAIL: payload contains 'AIL|', hasAIP: payload contains 'AIP|' }]

logger.doc:name: 9. Post-HL7 Write A08
logger.message: A08 HL7 MESSAGE - Type: ADT^A08, Size: #[sizeOf(payload)]
"invaild ADT type"

logger.doc:name: 10. Contact Flow Response
logger.message: CONTACT FLOW RESPONSE - Status: #[if (payload contains 'Error') 'ERROR' else 'SUCCESS'], Message: #[payload]

#[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { correlationId : correlationId, eventTimestamp : now(), applicationName: Mule::p('app.name'), flowName: flow.name default "implementation-flows", environment: upper(Mule::p('mule.env')), source: Mule::p('source'), target: Mule::p('target'), message: "response sent to viva-sf-ng-outbound-sapi" }]
